items.caption: A small, rodent-like animal perched on a rock. the creature has a brownish-grey fur, a pointed snout, and large, round eyes. it appears to be a primate, possibly a type of tree shrew, with a body that is slightly larger than a squirrel. the background is blurred, but it seems to be a dense, green environment, possibly a forest or jungle. the text in the image suggests that this animal is an ancestral primate, specifically the oriental tree shrew.
